name: academorix/notifications-sms
purpose: SMS notification channel — SmsOptOut aggregate for TCPA + CASL evidence, plus Twilio / MessageBird / Vonage / Plivo / AWS SNS drivers with cost-cap entitlement.
capabilities: SmsOptOut aggregate — TCPA + CASL evidence-grade records
Providers: Twilio, MessageBird, Vonage, Plivo, AWS SNS
when_to_use: An app needs SMS notifications with multi-provider transport plus TCPA/CASL opt-out evidence and STOP-keyword handling.
when_not_to_use: For push or email transports, use the matching sibling channel packages.
